key_signals: CTRE: Mizuho initiates at Outperform with $42 price target — expands analyst coverage
OHI: Q1 2026 earnings scheduled April 30 — consensus EPS $0.63
SBRA: $240M investment pipeline expected to close Q1-Q2 2026
MPW: Shares off 8% on week amid operator restructuring and dividend coverage questions
NHI: $500M at-the-market equity offering program launched
broad_highlights: CMS finalizes FY2026 SNF payment rate at +3.2% net — positive for operator margins
Medicare Advantage enrollment tops 34M; insurers expanding SNF authorization scrutiny
Medicaid cuts projected in reconciliation bill — long-term care providers watching closely
SNF national occupancy hits 79%, projected 80-81% by end of 2026
Hospital discharge volumes +4.2% in 2024, boosting post-acute referral pipelines

thesis_points: Aggressive capital deployer — $1.8B+ invested in 2025, $142M deal announced in early 2026
16% dividend hike signals management confidence in pipeline accretion and cash flow visibility
Pure-play SNF/AL focus benefits from CMS 3.2% net rate increase (FY2026) and rising occupancy (~79% → 81%)
SNF staffing mandate rollback removes a major structural headwind for operators
Mizuho Outperform initiation ($42 PT) expands analyst coverage and adds buy-side visibility
Risks: capital deployment pace slowing, Medicare Advantage expansion pressuring operator margins, interest rate sensitivity
